channel.title: DC on Myers & Shah PLLC
channel.description: Recent content in DC on Myers & Shah PLLC

item.title: How to Appeal a BZA Zoning Variance Denial in Washington, D.C.
item.description: A denial by the DC Board of Zoning Adjustment is not the end of the road. Here is what property owners and developers need to know about their appeal options and timelines.

item.title: Tax Incentives for Real Estate Development in the District of Columbia: What Developers Need to Know
item.description: DC offers several powerful tax incentive programs for real estate development, including TIF, tax abatements, and QHTC benefits. Here is a practical overview of the tools available.
